user.title: Connect to Cisco RoomOS device
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Cisco Webex / RoomOS device. HTTPS and the WebSocket xAPI must be enabled on the device.

data_description.name: Shown as the device name in Home Assistant. Leave blank to use the name the device reports, or the host/IP if it doesn't have one set.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Cisco RoomOS device
reauth_confirm.description: The username/password for {host} is no longer valid. Enter updated credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the host, port, and that the WebSocket xAPI is enabled.

dial.name: Dial
dial.description: Place an outgoing call to a number, SIP URI, or Webex address.

number.name: Number
number.description: The number, SIP URI, or address to dial.

hang_up.name: Hang up
hang_up.description: Disconnect an active call. If no call is specified, all active calls are disconnected.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The specific incoming call to accept.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The specific incoming call to reject.

send_dtmf.name: Send DTMF
send_dtmf.description: Send DTMF tones on an active call.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The specific call to send DTMF on.

share_local.name: Share locally
share_local.description: Start presentation sharing to the local screen only (not sent to the far end).

connector_id.name: Connector ID
connector_id.description: The video input connector ID to share.

share_remote.name: Share to call
share_remote.description: Start presentation sharing to the local screen and to the far end of an active call.

connector_id.name: Connector ID
connector_id.description: The video input connector ID to share.
